name: Italian-Flavored Shrimp Dip
recipeIngredient: 4.5 oz Tiny shrimp (1 can) rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sour cream and cream cheese in a medium bowl; beat until fluffy.
2. Beat in the Italian salad dressing mix and lemon juice.
3. Stir in the shrimp and bell pepper.
4. Chill, covered at least one hour.
Makes about 2.5 cups.
